title: Phase 1: About Card Implementation
description:
Add professional about card showcasing AWS career, certifications, and education

Duration: 2-3 sessions

Planning context: docs/planning/context-about-card/

title: Feature 1.1: About card with AWS career and certifications
description:
User Story: As a portfolio visitor, I want to see the professional background, AWS career trajectory, and verifiable certifications so that I can understand the expertise behind the project work

Acceptance Criteria:
- Card 6 displays About section with clear title and structure
- AWS career timeline shows 3-4 key milestones from 2016-present
- 4 AWS certification badges are displayed and clickable to Credly verification
- Education section lists degree and specializations
- Design is consistent with portfolio aesthetic (fonts, colors, hover effects)

Tracer Strategy:
- Minimal flow: Replace Card 6 → Add vertical sections → Add content → Integrate Credly → Apply styling
- Layers: Structure layer (layout) → Content layer (timeline/education) → Integration layer (Credly script) → Styling layer (design system)
- Expansion: Skills section (deferred if space tight), additional certifications (future)

title: Replace Card 6 with vertical section layout
description:
Tracer: Foundation - proves new layout pattern works, different from project cards

Description:
- Locate Card 6 placeholder at line 820 in page.tsx
- Replace with new card structure using vertical sections
- Add About title (h2) and subtitle
- Create section containers for timeline, certifications, education
- Maintain 60px padding, 875×525px dimensions
- No tech logos on right, no metrics at bottom

Deliverable: Card 6 with empty vertical sections and About header
Reference: Cards 2-5 for consistent styling patterns, but different layout
Estimated time: 30 min

title: Add AWS career timeline content
description:
Tracer: Content layer - proves timeline section works with proper spacing

Description:
- Add "AWS Career" section heading
- Add 3-4 key career milestones from resume:
  * 2016: Joined Amazon (BI Engineer, EHS)
  * 2017: Moved to AWS T&C (Sr. BI Engineer)
  * 2022: Promoted to Sr. TPM, BI & Analytics
  * 2024: Sr. TPM, Data & ML Engineering
  * 2025: Sr. TPM, AI-Native Engineering (current)
- Use bullet list (ul/li) with proper semantic HTML
- Apply text-sm class, max-w constraints
- Test spacing with outline mode toggle

Deliverable: Timeline section with 3-4 career milestones, properly styled
Reference: Resume-2026-01-26.md for career history
Estimated time: 20 min

title: Add education content section

  * Specialization, Systems Engineering - UC Boulder (2026)

Deliverable: Education section with degree and specializations, properly spaced
Reference: Resume-2026-01-26.md lines 288-309

title: Integrate Credly certification badges
description:
Tracer: Integration layer - proves external script works, badges render correctly

Description:
- Add "AWS Certifications" section heading above education
- Create 4 badge divs with data attributes:
  * data-share-badge-id (unique per certification)
  * data-iframe-width="150"
  * data-iframe-height="270"
  * data-share-badge-host="https://www.credly.com"
- Layout badges in horizontal row (flex with gap)
- Add next/script component at end of page:
  * src="https://cdn.credly.com/assets/utilities/embed.js"
  * strategy="lazyOnload"
- Test badge loading in dev mode
- Add fallback text if script fails to load

Deliverable: 4 Credly badges rendering in horizontal row with verification links
Reference: User-provided embed code, architecture.md for badge IDs
Estimated time: 30 min

⚠️ BLOCKER: Need 3 additional Credly badge IDs:
- AWS Solutions Architect Associate
- AWS Data Engineer Associate
- AWS ML Engineer Associate
(GenAI Professional ID already provided: 4890a175-8a9e-4d6c-9a37-2c8625295e39)

title: Apply design system and outline mode styling
description:
Tracer: Styling layer - proves consistency with existing cards

Description:
- Apply isOutlineMode conditional styling to all text elements:
  * Title, subtitle, section headings, body text
  * Outline style: color #D5CBBA, text-shadow, antialiasing
  * Normal style: color var(--text-primary)
- Apply consistent typography:
  * h2: text-[2.75rem] font-bold
  * h3 (sections): text-base font-medium uppercase
  * Body: text-sm
- Apply color system:
  * Primary text: #000 / #D5CBBA (outline)
  * Secondary text: #534C44
  * Accent: #42784F (if needed)
- Test hover effects if card has href
- Verify spacing, alignment with other cards
- Test in both outline and normal modes

Deliverable: Fully styled about card consistent with portfolio design system
Reference: Cards 2-5 for styling patterns, globals.css for color variables
Estimated time: 30 min

title: Polish spacing and verify responsiveness
description:
Tracer: Verification layer - proves card works across modes and fits height

Description:
- Measure total content height, ensure < 405px usable space
- Adjust section spacing (mb-6, mb-8, mb-12) if needed
- Verify Credly badges don't overflow (270px + content)
- Test horizontal scrolling to Card 6
- Test keyboard navigation (arrow keys)
- Verify outline mode toggle works correctly
- Check for any visual inconsistencies
- Consider adding optional skills section if space allows

Deliverable: Polished about card with verified spacing and responsiveness
Reference: HorizontalScroll.tsx for scroll behavior
Estimated time: 20 min

title: Document Card 6 non-clickable design decision
description:
Discovery Source: zem-rose-smw.1.1 - Replace Card 6 with vertical section layout
Discovered During: serve phase

Impact:
Minor documentation gap. Card 6 lacks href unlike other info cards (e.g., Card 7: Contact). 
While intentional, the rationale isn't documented inline.

Context:
Card 6 is content-focused (embedded sections) rather than navigation-focused.
Should add inline comment explaining non-clickable design decision.

Related: src/app/page.tsx:821

title: Add explicit list styling to career timeline
description:
Discovery Source: zem-rose-smw.1.2 - Add AWS career timeline content
Discovered During: serve phase

Impact:
Minor styling enhancement - explicit list-style-type would be more predictable than browser defaults.

Context:
The ul element at line 859-860 in src/app/page.tsx doesn't explicitly define list-style-type.
Consider adding list-disc or list-none to className depending on desired visual style.
Related: src/app/page.tsx:859-860

title: Add bullet indentation to career timeline
description:
Discovery Source: zem-rose-smw.1.2 - Add AWS career timeline content
Discovered During: serve phase

Impact:
Minor styling enhancement - explicit bullet padding would provide better control over indentation.

Context:
If bullets are shown (list-disc), the default browser padding may not align perfectly with the design system.
Consider adding pl-5 or pl-6 to the ul className at line 860 to control bullet indentation explicitly.
Related: src/app/page.tsx:860

title: Optimize mobile responsiveness
description: Ensure horizontal scroll works smoothly on mobile devices
